title: Senior Software Engineer - Bosch India Software Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Bosch India Software Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
